name: policypilot
description: AFCA Complaint Triage & Compliance Copilot – AI-powered complaint classification, risk scoring, and regulatory response drafting for Australian financial services
author: Osman Orka

features.rag_pipeline: End-to-end retrieval-augmented generation with ASIC regulatory knowledge
features.prompt_engineering: 3-version prompt strategy (naive → CoT → few-shot) with comparative evaluation
features.risk_scoring: 4-dimension weighted composite score (category, monetary, timeline, complexity)
features.entity_extraction: Hybrid regex NER for financial entities (amounts, dates, regulations, products)
features.production_api: Async FastAPI with middleware, CORS, structured logging, Prometheus metrics
features.batch_processing: CSV upload and bulk triage (up to 50 complaints)
features.monitoring: Prometheus metrics for latency, cost, token usage, risk distribution
features.evaluation: 30 test cases with category accuracy, risk accuracy, entity recall metrics
features.dashboard: 5-page Streamlit app (Triage, Batch, Analytics, Eval, Executive ROI)

domain: Australian Financial Services / AFCA / ASIC Regulatory Compliance
data_sources: ASIC Regulatory Guides (RG 271, RG 209, RG 272, RG 274, RG 78, RG 256)
